chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 914 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4328/2020 3.For hearing of main case 02-05-2023 Petitioner No.3 Hameedullah present person. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Hameedullah (petitioner No.3) files statement to the effect that he withdraws instant petition, as his grievance has been redressed, statement is taken on record. It is reported by learned AAG that vide order dated 19.04.2023, petitioner No.1 Zamir Hussain had already withdrawn this petition. He also states that petitioner No.2 Muhammad Yakoob has retired from service, hence this petition to his extent has become infructuous. Since rest of the two petitioners have withdrawn this petition, hence, instant petition stands dismissed as withdrawn along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
